Preparation — Day packs

Load one or more daypack_YYYYMMDD.json files (built with build_daypack.py). Each test session replays the market from a fixed Paris start time. In production this step is server-side and invisible to candidates.

Welcome to Sigma Dynamix

Watch this short introduction before starting your application.

Application — Screening

The full assessment has two parts: this questionnaire, then a trading simulation. It takes 30 to 45 minutes in total. Please start only when you can complete it in one sitting, and do not refresh or close the page — this avoids any issue with your attempt.

Fill in your details, then answer the questions below.

Good — a few things to know

Quick answers about the role, before the strategy presentation.

Thank you for applying

Your profile does not match the criteria for this recruitment round. You are welcome to apply again in a future campaign.

Assessment already taken

Our records show this assessment has already been started or completed from this device / email address. Each candidate may only take the trading tests once. If you believe this is an error, please contact us.

Strategy presentation

Before the tests, watch a short live demonstration of how our operators work.

At Sigma Dynamix, operators do not analyse the market: our systems do. When conditions match the firm's strategy, an authorization signal lights up. Your job is to execute — enter in the allowed direction, quickly and consistently. Every position is protected by an automatic 70-tick trailing stop.

Our strategy works in pairs of operators. There is always one BUYER and one SELLER, and each operator is assigned a single role. If you are the buyer, your goal is to enter on a bearish pullback to get a good entry price — while your paired seller does the exact opposite, selling into strength. The strategy works when both of you hunt for good prices, so that the spread between the buyer's price and the seller's price stays positive. As a buyer, never chase a rising market: that is exactly where the seller will be. Always wait for the pullback.

The demo replays a real NQ market moment and executes two example trades, with commentary. Watching it in full is required before the tests.

Did you understand everything?

You can rewatch the demo if anything is unclear — otherwise, continue to the trading tests.

Before you start the trading tests

You are about to take 3 trading sessions (BUY only, SELL only, then BUY only), each starting at a fixed market time and containing 10 authorization signals triggered live by the firm's strategy.

⚠ Please read carefully:
• The full test takes 30 to 45 minutes.
• You may pause between two signals, but the tests must be completed in one sitting.
• If you close or refresh this page, your attempt is lost.
• You can take this assessment only once.
